// Re: ports/179681: [Maintainer Update] graphics/gimp-help and subsidiary ports

patches and action, (so it comes too long), and supports staging.
You may ignore my old report.

My former google account <liangtai.s4@gmail.com> was
banned for uncertain reason.  Very sad.
